pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing hub for the zombie-themed event with featured attractions, events, promotions, and direct entry points into booking, planning, and shopping flows.
primary_functions: Highlight featured attractions, events, promotions, and dates (e.g., Haunted Maze, Zombie Escape Room, Halloween specials).
Provide quick-entry CTAs to buy tickets, view schedule, browse attractions, shop merch, and open map & parking.
Show basic event info (location, dates, operating hours, safety notes) with links to detailed pages.
Expose global search (optional) for attractions, events, and merch.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary 'Buy Tickets' or similar CTA.
Click 'Explore Attractions' CTA.
Click 'View Full Schedule' CTA.
Click 'Workshops & Shows' section link.
Click 'Shop Merch' CTA or merch teaser.
Click 'Map & Parking' teaser or link.
Click a featured attraction card.
Click a featured event/workshop card.
Click cart icon in header.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry via 'Home' link.
Default landing URL shared in marketing or typed directly.

pages.name: Tickets & Attractions Listing
pages.description: Master listing of ticketed attractions and experiences with date/time and scare-level filters, used as the main entry to ticket purchase and attraction browsing flows.
primary_functions: List all ticketed attractions (e.g., Haunted Maze, Zombie Escape Room) as cards with summary info and starting prices.
Allow switching views (tickets vs. attractions directory) using a mode parameter (e.g., view=tickets or view=attractions).
In tickets view: filter attractions by date (calendar), time of day (morning/afternoon/evening/late), and basic tags (e.g., high_scare, kid_friendly).
In attractions view: filter by tags (kid_friendly, family_friendly, intense), scare level range (e.g., 1–5 slider or checkboxes), and age ratings (all_ages, 10_plus, 13_plus).
Open an attraction detail / ticket booking page when a user clicks an attraction card.
Let users mark attraction cards as favorites via heart/save icon.
Provide an 'All Attractions' / 'Back to attractions' context link for returning from detail pages while preserving selected filters.

incoming_params.description: Controls listing mode: 'tickets' for date/time-focused booking, 'attractions' for directory view. Used to set initial view_mode.
Selected calendar date in YYYY-MM-DD format for which to show ticket availability.
Time-of-day filter, e.g., 'morning', 'afternoon', 'evening', 'late'.
Comma-separated attraction tags to filter by (e.g., 'kid_friendly,high_scare').
Minimum scare level filter (inclusive).
Maximum scare level filter (inclusive).
Comma-separated age rating codes to include, e.g., 'all_ages,ten_plus'.
Sort order key such as 'price_low_to_high' or 'time_earliest_first'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an attraction card to configure tickets for that attraction and date.
Click 'View all favorites' link in favorites hint/banner.
Click cart icon in header from this page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Tickets' and 'Attractions' header links with different view parameters.
Accessible via 'Tickets & Attractions' footer link.
Sharable deep links including filters and view mode (e.g., tickets.html?view=tickets&date=2024-10-31).

pages.name: Attraction Detail & Ticket Booking
pages.description: Detail view for a single attraction with full description, date & timeslot selection, ticket configuration, promo code application, add-ons, and actions to add tickets to cart or proceed straight to checkout.
primary_functions: Display full attraction details (description, scare level, age rating, duration, location, map snippet, and included features).
Provide a date picker to select the event date (e.g., October 29, October 31, November 1).
Offer time filters (e.g., evening_after_6pm, start_after_8pm, before_7pm) and sorting options (price_low_to_high, earliest_time_first) for available timeslots.
Show a list/grid of available timeslots for the selected date, filtered and sorted according to user choices.
Allow selection of a single timeslot and configuration of ticket quantity or party size for that timeslot.
Support ticket type options such as standard vs. vip for applicable attractions (e.g., VIP Zombie Escape Room).
Provide an add-ons section for optional extras (e.g., photo_and_video_package) with selectable checkboxes.
Include a promo code input (e.g., BRAIN10) with an Apply button to update pricing for the selected tickets.
Offer both 'Add to cart' and 'Proceed to checkout' / 'Reserve Now' actions for the configured ticket selection.
Include navigation links back to the Tickets & Attractions listing for the currently selected date or back to all attractions.

incoming_params.description: ID of the attraction to display and book tickets for.
Preselected date in YYYY-MM-DD format used to load timeslots for that day.
Optional time filter to apply to timeslots (e.g., 'evening_after_6pm', 'start_after_8pm', 'before_7pm').
Optional timeslot sort key such as 'price_low_to_high' or 'earliest_time_first'.
Optional ticket option code such as 'standard' or 'vip' to preselect the ticket type.
Reference context for back-link behavior, e.g., 'tickets', 'attractions', or 'favorites'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click cart icon or 'View Cart' after adding tickets to cart.
Click 'Proceed to checkout' / 'Reserve Now' after configuring tickets.
Click 'Back to tickets for this date' from detail page.
Click 'Back to all attractions' context link.

access_methods.description: Accessed by clicking attraction cards and passing ?attractionId=... (and optional date/time filters).
Marketing deep links can point directly to a specific attraction with preselected date.

pages.name: Shopping Cart
pages.description: Central review area for tickets, merch items, and parking passes in the user’s basket, with options to adjust quantities, fulfillment methods, and proceed to checkout.
primary_functions: List all cart items grouped by type (tickets, merch, workshops registrations if paid, parking passes) with quantities and prices.
Allow users to adjust quantities or remove items for tickets, merch, and parking.
Display and edit fulfillment options for merch (e.g., ship_to_address vs. pick_up_at_event_venue) with clear selection.
Show ticket details (attraction name, date, time, ticket type, add-ons) and allow editing via links back to the relevant attraction detail pages.
Show parking pass details (location, date, arrival_time) with link back to map & parking if adjustments are needed.
Display order subtotal, taxes/fees, and estimated total, with a clear 'Proceed to checkout' button.

incoming_params.description: Optional cart_item_id to highlight/scroll to after adding an item.
Optional source context such as 'tickets', 'merch', or 'parking' for analytics or UI messaging.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Proceed to checkout' button.
Click 'Edit tickets' on a ticket-type cart line.
Click 'View product' / 'Edit' for a merch item.
Click 'Change parking' for a parking pass line.

access_methods.description: Accessible at any time via 'Cart' header link/icon.
Sharable link to current cart with optional highlightItemId.

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Final purchase step summarizing all items in the cart, collecting purchaser details and payment, and confirming the order.
primary_functions: Summarize all items being purchased (tickets, merch, parking) and their totals, carrying over applied promo codes from ticket pages.
Collect purchaser information such as name, email, phone, and any required acknowledgment (e.g., waivers).
Collect payment and billing details using a simple payment form or integrated payment method.
Confirm merch delivery method (including pick_up_at_event_venue) and show relevant instructions.
Provide a confirm / place_order button that finalizes the order and displays a confirmation message or redirect to a confirmation view.

incoming_params.description: Indicates whether user came from cart ('cart') or directly from an attraction booking ('attraction'), for UI messaging.

access_methods.description: Primary flow from Cart via 'Proceed to checkout' button.
Direct navigation to checkout.html allowed when a cart exists.

pages.name: Shop / Merch Listing
pages.description: Storefront listing zombie-themed merchandise with category selection, filters, and search, used to build merch bundles and navigate to product details.
primary_functions: List merch items as product cards with images, price, rating, and quick-view of availability.
Provide category selection (e.g., apparel, accessories, souvenirs) including an Apparel category used in user flows.
Offer filters for price range (with a max_price control, e.g., up to $25) and rating (e.g., 4_stars_and_up).
Include a search bar to search within merch (e.g., 'zombie') and update results accordingly.
Allow clicking a product card to open the product detail page.

incoming_params.description: Merch category code to filter by, e.g., 'apparel', 'accessories'. Defaults to a featured category such as 'apparel'.
Maximum price filter for products, used to configure ranges such as <= 25.
Minimum rating threshold, e.g., 4 for '4 stars & up'.
Search term entered in the shop search bar (e.g., 'zombie').
Optional comma-separated merch tags for finer filtering (e.g., 'tshirt,hoodie').
Sort order for products such as 'price_low_to_high' or 'rating_high_to_low'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a merch product card.
Click cart icon in header from the shop page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Shop' header link.
Sharable filtered views, e.g., shop.html?category=apparel&max_price=25&min_rating=4&search_query=zombie.

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detail view for an individual merch item with full description, options, and add-to-cart controls used in merch bundle creation.
primary_functions: Show detailed product information: images, description, available sizes/options, price, rating, and reviews snippet.
Allow the user to set quantity (e.g., 1) and select product options (size, color) if applicable.
Provide an 'Add to cart' button to add the configured product to the shopping cart.
Include navigation back to the filtered merch listing (e.g., previous apparel search results).

incoming_params.description: ID of the merchandise product to display.
Context of navigation, typically 'shop', used for back-link behavior.
Original category filter to reconstruct 'Back to results' navigation.
Original max_price filter from the listing view.
Original min_rating filter from the listing view.
Original search term from merch listing.
Original tags filter from merch listing.
Original sort order from merch listing.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click cart icon or 'View Cart' after adding item.
Click 'Back to results' link.

access_methods.description: Accessed with ?productId=... from listing or cart.

pages.name: Event Calendar & Workshops Listing
pages.description: Calendar-driven listing of all scheduled events, shows, and workshops with date, time, price, and tag filters as well as different view modes for full schedule vs. workshops & shows.
primary_functions: Display a calendar date picker to choose a specific date (e.g., October 30) or a date range (e.g., October 28–30).
Show a list or grid of events for the selected date or date range with titles, times, locations, and tags.
Provide a time range filter (e.g., start_time and end_time) to focus on specific portions of the day (such as 5pm–10pm or 1pm–4pm).
Offer price filters, including a free_events option (max_price = 0) for locating free workshops like the Zombie Makeup Workshop.
Offer tag/category filters (e.g., family_friendly, workshops, shows) and support a view parameter (e.g., view=all_events or view=workshops).
Allow users to click an event card to open the detailed event/workshop page.
Indicate which events are already added to My Night Plan for quick visual reference.

incoming_params.description: View mode: 'all_events' for full schedule, 'workshops' for workshops & shows.
Single date in YYYY-MM-DD format when focusing on one day like October 30.
Start of date range for multi-day views (YYYY-MM-DD).
End of date range for multi-day views (YYYY-MM-DD).
Start of daily time window filter (HH:MM, 24-hour), e.g., '17:00' for 5 PM.
End of daily time window filter, e.g., '22:00' for 10 PM.
Max price used to implement free-only or low-cost filters (0 for free).
Whether to limit results to free events/workshops.
Comma-separated event tags such as 'family_friendly,workshop'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an event/workshop card.
Click 'My Night Plan' header link from the schedule page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Schedule' and 'Workshops & Shows' header links using different ?view parameters.
Accessible via 'Event Calendar' and 'Workshops & Shows' footer links.
Sharable filtered schedule links, e.g., schedule.html?view=all_events&date=2024-10-30&start_time=17:00&end_time=22:00.

pages.name: Event / Workshop Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific scheduled event or workshop, letting users add it to My Night Plan or, for free workshops, complete the registration form.
primary_functions: Display full event details including title, description, date, time, duration, location, capacity (if relevant), and tags (e.g., family_friendly).
Provide an 'Add to My Night Plan' button for events that are part of the customizable evening plan.
Provide a 'Register Free' button and registration form for free workshops such as the Zombie Makeup Workshop.
Collect registration details: full_name, email, phone, and party_size / number_of_attendees.
Allow optional newsletter signup with a checkbox that can remain unchecked by default.
Confirm successful registration with an inline message or redirect while keeping access to event details.

incoming_params.description: ID of the event or workshop to display.
Optional context specifier, typically 'schedule', used for 'Back to calendar' behavior.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to calendar' link from the event detail page.
Click 'View My Night Plan' link/button after adding an event to the plan.

access_methods.description: Accessed by clicking events in the schedule or via featured events on the homepage using ?eventId=....

pages.name: My Night Plan
pages.description: Personalized overview of the user’s planned events for the evening, showing a chronological list, overlaps, and allowing adjustments.
primary_functions: List all events added via 'Add to My Night Plan' sorted chronologically by date and start time.
Show key details for each planned event (title, date, time, location, duration) and any time overlaps.
Allow users to remove events from their plan or adjust ordering if needed.
Provide quick links back to each event’s detail page for more information or changes.
Offer a printable or shareable summary view for the planned night (optional).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an event title within My Night Plan.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'My Night Plan' header link.
Can be opened after adding events to the plan from event detail pages.

pages.name: Favorites / Saved Attractions
pages.description: Collection page for attractions the user has favorited, often used as a shortlist when planning kid-friendly or themed visits.
primary_functions: List all attractions the user has marked as favorite or saved, with summary info (scare level, age rating, type).
Provide quick filters within favorites (e.g., kid_friendly_only, high_scare_only).
Allow users to open attraction detail pages directly from favorites to book tickets.
Allow users to remove items from favorites if they no longer wish to keep them saved.

incoming_params.description: Optional tag filter applied within favorites, e.g., 'kid_friendly'. Passed through to getFavoritesList.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved attraction card.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Favorites' header link.
Favorites list can be filtered by tag via ?tag_filter=kid_friendly.

pages.name: Map & Parking
pages.description: Interactive map experience showing venues like the Quarantine Zone Arena and nearby parking areas, enabling users to search, filter by distance, and add parking passes to their cart.
primary_functions: Display a map with pins for key locations (e.g., Quarantine Zone Arena) and parking areas.
Include a map search bar to search for venues by name (e.g., 'Quarantine Zone Arena') and highlight matching pins.
Show a venue details panel when a venue pin or search result is selected, including address and description.
Provide a 'Find nearby parking' control that filters and lists parking options around the selected venue.
Offer distance filters for parking (e.g., max_distance = 500_m) and update the list/map of available parking areas.
Show parking area details (name, distance, pricing, restrictions) in a panel within the same page when selected.
Provide an 'Add Parking Pass' action that opens a pass options form (date and arrival_time) and adds the configured pass to the cart.
Link to the shopping cart so users can review the newly added parking pass.

incoming_params.description: Optional venue ID to center the map and open venue details, e.g., for 'View on map' links.
Optional parking area ID to focus a specific parking area for editing.
Maximum distance filter in meters when listing nearby parking (e.g., 500).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' after successfully adding a parking pass.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Map & Parking' header link.
Accessible via 'Map & Parking' footer link.
Deep links can preselect a venue, e.g., map_parking.html?venueId=...&max_distance_meters=500.

pages.name: About the Event
pages.description: Static informational page describing the story, types of experiences, dates, location, accessibility, and safety details for the zombie-themed event.
primary_functions: Explain the event concept, story, and types of attractions offered (maze, escape room, shows, workshops).
Provide high-level information about dates, location, accessibility, and safety.
Link to key functional pages such as Tickets, Schedule, Map & Parking, and FAQ.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Book Tickets' link from About page.
Click 'See full schedule' link.
Click 'View map & parking' link.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About' footer link.
Marketing or info pages can link directly to about.html.

pages.name: Contact & Support
pages.description: Support page with contact details and a general inquiry form for questions about tickets, attractions, parking, and policies.
primary_functions: Display contact channels such as email, phone number, and venue address.
Provide a simple contact form for general inquiries (subject, message, contact details).
Offer quick links to FAQ and Policies for self-service help.

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected topic for the contact form, e.g., 'tickets', 'parking'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View FAQ' quick link.
Click 'View policies' quick link.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Contact' footer link.
Linked from confirmation emails or support messaging.

pages.name: FAQ
pages.description: Frequently asked questions about the event, tickets, age restrictions, scare levels, parking, and accessibility, with links into relevant functional pages.
primary_functions: Answer common questions on topics like ticket changes, age restrictions, scare levels, parking, and accessibility.
Provide internal links to relevant functional pages (Tickets, Map & Parking, Policies, Schedule).
Reduce support load by guiding users to self-service solutions.

incoming_params.description: Optional FAQ category to focus on, such as 'tickets', 'parking', or 'accessibility'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Buy tickets' link from a tickets-related FAQ.
Click 'View map & parking' from a parking-related FAQ.
Click 'See schedule' from an events-related FAQ.
Click 'Read full policies' from a policy-related FAQ.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'FAQ' footer link.
FAQs can be deep-linked by category via ?category=tickets.

pages.name: Policies (Terms, Privacy, Refunds)
pages.description: Combined legal and policy page that surfaces terms & conditions, privacy practices, and refund/rescheduling policies for the event and website.
primary_functions: Present terms and conditions for ticket purchases, merchandise, and participation in attractions.
Explain privacy practices regarding user data, analytics, and communications.
Detail refund, cancellation, and rescheduling policies for tickets and events.
Provide legal contact information and effective dates of policies.

incoming_params.description: Determines which policy section to focus on, e.g., 'terms', 'privacy', or 'refunds'. Passed through to getPoliciesContent.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact us about this policy' link.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Policies' footer link.
Specific policy sections can be deep-linked via policies.html?policy_type=refunds.

header_links.description: Browse and buy tickets for attractions by date and time.
Explore all attractions with scare level and kid-friendly filters.
View the full event calendar for all shows and activities.
Browse and filter workshops and shows, including free events.
Find venues and reserve nearby parking passes.
View and manage your planned evening schedule.
See attractions you have saved for later.
Review items in your cart and proceed to checkout.

footer_links.description: Learn more about the event and organizers.
Get in touch with event support.
Terms, privacy policy, and refund information.
Buy tickets and see available attractions.
Browse the full schedule of events.
See all workshops and stage shows.
View the venue map and parking options.
